sources.limitations: Positive conviction record only; not a full criminal-history search. Establishes the existence and content of the specific adjudicated conviction (offense, date of conviction, court) but cannot be used to infer absence of other convictions, absence of other charges, or any non-conviction facts. Classification of the offense as an aggravated felony is as characterized in the packet, not an independent legal determination.
sources.title: Certified federal court judgment
